text: Appointment to the category specified in column (1) of the Table below shall be made by the methods specified in the corresponding entries in column (2) thereof:- TABLE Category Method of appointment (1) (2) 1(a) Assistant Section (i) by promotion from among the categories of Assistants Officers in the in the Departments of Secretariat other than Law and Departments of Finance Departments and the Governor’s Secretariat, Secretariat other than Senior Personal Clerks in the Departments of the Law and Finance Secretariat other than Finance Department and Departments and the Senior Typists in the Departments of Secretariat other Governor's Secretariat. than Finance Department in the ratio of 4:1:1; or (ii) Omitted (iii) by direct recruitment; or (iv) by recruitment by transfer from the category of Assistants in Tamil Nadu Ministerial Service or the Tamil Nadu Judicial Ministerial Service. 1(b) Assistant Section (i) by promotion from the category of Assistants in the Officers in the Law Law Department; or Department. (ii) by transfer from other Departments of Secretariat; or (iii) by direct recruitment 1(c) Assistant Section (i) by promotion from the category of Assistant or Officers in the Personal Clerks in the Governor’s Secretariat; or Governor's Secretariat. (ii) by transfer from the category of Assistant Section Officers of the Departments of Secretariat; or (iii) by transfer from the category of Personal Assistants in the Governor’s Secretariat. 1(d) Assistant Section (i) by promotion from among the categories of Officers in the Finance Assistants, Senior Personal Clerks and Senior Department. Typists in the Finance Department in the ratio of 4:1:1; or (ii) Omitted. (iii) by direct recruitment; or (iv) by recruitment by transfer from the category of Assistants in Tamil Nadu Ministerial Service or in the Tamil Nadu Judicial Ministerial Service. 1A Assistant Section by direct recruitment or transfer from any other Officers (Translation). category or recruitment by transfer from any other service. 1B Assistant Reception (i) by direct recruitment; or Officer, Tamil Nadu (ii) by transfer from Assistant Section Officers; or House, New Delhi. (iii) by promotion from among the Steno-Typists in Tamil Nadu House, New Delhi; or (iv) by recruitment by transfer from the holders of the post of Receptionist or House Keeper in the Tamil Nadu General Subordinate Service or from the post of Junior Assistant, Telephone Operator, Store-Keeper or Typist in Tamil Nadu House, New Delhi in the Tamil Nadu Ministerial Service or from any other service; 2A Personal Assistants ( i ) by promotion from the category of Senior Personal in the Departments C lerks; or of Secretariat other ( ii ) by promotion from the category of Personal Clerks; if than Finance no qualified candidates are available by the above Department. method; or (iii) for special reasons recruitment by transfer from any other service. 2B Personal Assistants in (i) by promotion from the category of Senior Personal Finance Department. Clerks in Finance Department; or (ii) by promotion from the category of Personal Clerks, if no qualified candidates are available by the above method; or (iii) for special reasons recruitment by transfer from any other service. 2C Senior Personal Clerks by promotion from the category of Personal Clerks. in the Departments of Secretariat other than Finance Department. 2D Senior Personal Clerks by promotion from the category of Personal Clerks in in Finance Department. Finance Department. 2E Senior Typists in the by promotion from the category of Typists. Departments of Secretariat other than Finance Department. 2F Senior Typists in by promotion from the category of Typists in Finance Finance Department. Department. 3(a) Assistants in the (i) by direct recruitment; or Departments of (ii) by recruitment by transfer from among the holders of Secretariat other than the posts of Junior Assistants and Assistant in the Law and Finance Tamil Nadu Ministerial Service and the Tamil Nadu Departments and the Judicial Ministerial Service; or Governor’s Secretariat. (iii) by promotion from the category of Typists or Telephone Operator in the Tamil Nadu Secretariat Service; or (iv) by recruitment by transfer from the posts of Record Clerks, Drivers, Office Assistants, Motor Cycle Messengers and Van Cleaners who are graduates working in Secretariat; or (v) by recruitment by transfer from the posts of Record Clerk and Typist who are not graduates working in Secretariat: Provided that fifty percent of the vacancies shall be filled up by direct recruitment and the remaining fifty percent of the vacancies shall be filled up by other methods as follows:- (i) Junior Assistants and Assistants in the 15% Tamil Nadu Ministerial service and the Tamil Nadu Judicial Ministerial Service. (ii) Record Clerks, Typists, Telephone 25% Operators, Drivers and Motor Cycle Messengers who are graduates working in Secretariat. (iii) Record Clerks and Typists who are not 5% graduates working in Secretariat. (iv) Office Assistants and Van Cleaners who 5% are graduates working in Secretariat: Provided further that if sufficient number of qualified and suitable persons are not available for appointment by any one of the four methods mentioned above, the unfilled vacancies may be filled up by the remaining three methods, subject to availability from time to time. 3(b) Assistants in the Law (i) by direct recruitment; or Department. (ii) by transfer from other Departments of Secretariat. 3(c) Assistants in the (i) by transfer from the category of Assistants from the Governor’s Secretariat. Departments of Secretariat; or (ii) by recruitment by transfer from any other service. 3(d) Assistants in the (i) By direct recruitment; or Finance Department. (ii) by promotion from the category of Typists in the Finance Department or if no qualified person is available from the Finance Department from any other Department of the Secretariat; or (iii) by recruitment by transfer from the category of Junior Assistant or Assistant in the Tamil Nadu Ministerial Service or in the Tamil Nadu Judicial Ministerial Service; or by recruitment by transfer from the category of Record Assistant or Record Clerk in the Tamil Nadu General Subordinate Service in the Finance Department and Office Assistant in the Tamil Nadu Basic Service in the Finance Department or if no qualified person is available from the Finance Department from any other Department of the Secretariat. Provided that fifty percent of the vacancies shall be filled up by direct recruitment and the remaining fifty percent of the vacancies shall be filed up by the other methods as follows:- (i) by promotion from the category of 25% Typists in Finance Department or if no qualified person is available from the Finance Department, from any other Department of Secretariat. (ii) by recruitment by transfer from the category of, - (a) Jun ior Assistant and Assistant in 15% the Tamil Nadu Ministerial Service or the Tamil Nadu Judicial Ministerial Service. (b) Record Assistants, Record Clerks, 10% Office Assistants in Finance Department or if no qualified person is available from the Finance Department, from any other Department of the Secretariat. Provided further that if sufficient number of qualified and suitable persons are not available for appointment by any one of the three methods mentioned above, the unfilled vacancies may be filled up by the remaining two methods, subject to availability from time to time. 3A Assistants by direc t recruitment or transfer from any other (Translations). category or recruitment by transfer from any other service. 4A Personal Clerks in the (i) by direct recruitment ;or Departments of (ii) by promotion from the category of Typists; or Secretariat other than (iii) for special reasons, recruitment by transfer from any Finance Department. other service. 4B Personal Clerks in (i) by direct recruitment ;or Finance Department. (ii) by promotion from the category of Typists in Finance Department; or (iii) for special reasons, recruitment by transfer from any other service. 5(a) Typists in the (i) by direct recruitment; or Departments of (ii) for special reasons, recruitment by transfer from any Secretariat other than other service. Finance Department. 5(aa) Typists in the Finance (i) by direct recruitment; or Department. (ii) for special reasons, recruitment by transfer from any other service. 5(b) Telex Operators in the by transfer from the category of Typists in the Public Department. Departments of Secretariat. 6 Telephone Operators (i) by direct recruitment; or in the Secretariat (ii) by transfer from the category of Typists in the Exchange (Public Departments of Secretariat other than Finance and Department) and the Planning Development and Special Initiatives Governor's Secretariat. Departments in the Tamil Nadu Secretariat Service. If qualified and suitable Typists are not available in the Departments of Secretariat, by transfer from the category of Telephone Operator in the State Guest House, who are approved probationers; or (iii) for special reasons, recruitment by transfer from any other service..
